description: Responsive card grid for discrete content objects — posts, features, team members. Not for decorative icon grids. Cards are 1-col mobile, 2-col tablet, 3-col desktop.

id.description: Optional HTML id attribute for anchor linking (e.g. navigation anchors).

title.description: Section heading above the grid. Omit if the context makes it clear.

variant.description: Grid presentation. 'default' = standard card grid. 'steps' = numbered process cards with visual connectors at desktop. Use 'steps' for How-it-works / process flows.

theme.description: Background color. Independent of variant (layout). 'default' = page background. 'dark' = surface background with borders. 'inverted' = inverted background for strong contrast.

items.description: Array of card items. Each: { title, text, image_url, link_url, link_text }. When variant is 'steps', also include: { number }.

number.description: Step number label (e.g. '1', '01', '1.'). Required when grid variant is 'steps'.

image_alt.description: Alt text for the card image. Leave empty only if the image is purely decorative.
